description.value:

Rank: 6

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: F, X.

The user gains a +1 inherent bonus to his Intelligence score. This bonus is permanent.

Expendable Components -Health drinks and pills. Purchase DC: 22

SHUUGYOU: KEKKEI GENKAI (TRAINING: BLOODLINE LIMIT) Training (General)

Rank: 6 (C); Learn DC: 18, 2 successes.

Whether through curiosity, familiarity or deep-seated hatred, you've studied the ins and outs of a known clan and their Kekkei Genkai ability to an extreme level.

When fighting an opponent with the selected Kekkei Genkai active, the Ninja gains a +2 bonus on Bluff, Listen, Sense Motive, Spot, and Survival checks when using these skills against these ninja. Likewise, he gets a +2 bonus on weapon damage rolls against them.

This technique may be taken more than once; each time it must be taken for a different Bloodline Limit.
